semantic_text:
feat(kubernetes): enhance datasci namespace and spark service configuration

- Added istio-injection label to the datasci namespace for Istio compatibility.
- Introduced networking.istio.io/exportTo annotation in spark-master-svc for better service exposure.
- Updated virtual service to use HTTPS and adjusted backend port to 8080 for the spark service.
